Arclite
☄️ Class
Blaster (Nuker)
Level
3 (19 XP)
Status
On operation
Power
Shoots hardlight arcs from another person that return after being shot.
Background
Their power is dangerously addictive to use.
Profile
Age: 23
v1.1 Systems
Stress: 3/100
Trait lean: Combat -1 (pulls squad toward direct combat resolution)
Traits
• Aggressive — favors kidnap scout in heists; main detail in protection
• Reserved — favors stealth entry in heists; main detail in protection
• Stubborn — double weight in op trait-votes
Base Stats
STR 6★ | VIT 6 | UTL 3 | CTR 4◆ | TEQ 3
Total: 22 (20 innate)
Effective Stats (with gear/feats)
STR 6 | VIT 10 | UTL 3 | CTR 4 | TEQ 3
Loadout
Weapon: empty
Costume: Steel Plate (Cap 2)
Gadget: Pipe Bomb (Cap 1)
Capacity: 3/3
